tagline: Autonomous AI That Runs Your Business

slides.title: The Problem
slides.content: Small and mid-size businesses spend 60+ hours/week on repetitive operations: marketing, content creation, customer service, website management, and reporting. They can't afford to hire full teams, and existing tools require constant manual input.

slides.title: The Solution
slides.content: myAI is a fully autonomous AI platform that runs business operations end-to-end. One command starts a self-improving loop that handles website creation, content marketing, video production, social media, email campaigns, and customer management — 24/7, without human intervention.

slides.title: Market Opportunity
slides.content: TAM: $500B+ (AI automation market by 2027, McKinsey). SAM: $50B (SMB automation SaaS). SOM: $500M (English-speaking SMBs seeking full automation). 200M+ small businesses globally need affordable automation.

slides.title: Product
slides.content: 7 autonomous modules: Website Generator, Blog Engine, Video Marketing (YouTube + Reels/TikTok), Social Media (Twitter, LinkedIn, Instagram, TikTok), Email System, CRM, Analytics. Self-improving agent loop — every run makes the system smarter.

slides.title: Business Model
slides.content: SaaS with 3 tiers: Starter ($399/mo), Pro ($999/mo), Enterprise ($2,499/mo). 14-day free trial. 90%+ gross margins. Projected LTV:CAC ratio of 90:1.

slides.title: Traction
slides.content: Working prototype with 7 modules. 4 successful autonomous runs. 6 website pages, 6 blog posts, 3 YouTube scripts, 5 Reels scripts, 12+ social posts, 3 email templates, content calendar, CRM — all generated autonomously.

slides.title: Competitive Advantage
slides.content: 1. Full autonomy (competitors require manual input). 2. Self-improving loop (compounding moat). 3. All-in-one platform (vs. point solutions). 4. Built-in distribution (AI creates its own marketing content at zero marginal cost). 5. 10x cheaper than hiring.

slides.title: Revenue Projections
slides.content: Year 1: 500 customers → $4.2M ARR. Year 2: 5,000 customers → $42M ARR. Year 3: 20,000 customers → $168M ARR. Path to $1B ARR in 5 years with enterprise expansion and international markets.

slides.title: The Ask
slides.content: $2M Seed Round. Use of funds: 40% Engineering, 25% Marketing, 15% Sales, 10% Operations, 10% Reserve. 18-month runway to reach $5M ARR and Series A readiness.

slides.title: Why Now
slides.content: LLMs reached production quality in 2024-2025. Autonomous agents are the logical next step. First-mover advantage in autonomous business platforms. The window to capture this market is 12-18 months.
